case_title: SANWA BANK CALIFORNIA FDBA LLOYDS BANK CALIF VS GEORGE, DOROTHY

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION DEC-13-1993, CONTINUED BY COURT TO JAN-26-1994 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 05

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF SANWA BANK CALIFORNIA FDBA LLOYDS BANK CALIF A CA CORP. IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT GEORGE, DOROTHY STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT FILED BY DEFENDANT GEORGE, DOROTHY HEARING SET FOR JAN-12-1994 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 08

MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,500.00 FILED BY SANWA BANK CALIFORNIA FDBA LLOYDS BANK CALIF A CA CORP. AS TO DEFENDANT GEORGE, DOROTHY ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR DEC-13-1993 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 03
SUBSTITUTED PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT GEORGE, DOROTHY
SC MOTION DISPOSITION MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT OF JAN-12-1994, GRANTED

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF SANWA BANK CALIFORNIA FDBA LLOYDS BANK CALIF A CA CORP. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT GEORGE, DOROTHY $2,500.00 PRINCIPAL, $80.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,580.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
